clusters.justification: Represents the macro-level processing of emotional valence, physiological arousal, and threat detection, typically subserved by salience and extended limbic functional configurations.
Reflects the computation of subjective worth, incentive salience, and outcome-based choice behavior, fundamentally relying on frontostriatal and reward circuit co-activations.
Captures internally directed representations of agents, encompassing self-referential narratives, interpersonal mapping, and social understanding structuralized by default mode network activity.
